query: GOOG Alphabet news this week May 2026

results.title: Alphabet ups 2026 capex to as much as $190 billion, expects to 'significantly increase' in 2027
Alphabet earnings call, Q1 2026: Sundar Pichai's remarks
Alphabet (GOOGL) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript | The Motley Fool
Wall Street Lifts Alphabet Price Targets After Cloud's 63% Growth
Alphabet tops Q1 estimates on strong Google Cloud growth

results.summary: Q1 2026 results: Net income $62.58B ($5.11/share, +81% YoY). Google Cloud hit $20B revenue (+63% YoY), backlog $460B. Full-year 2026 capex raised to $180B-$190B, 2027 capex expected to 'significantly increase'. GOOG shares surged ~10% post-earnings. Six Wall Street firms raised price targets on April 30. Google I/O scheduled May 19.
